summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 UI fixes on Lightened Self spiritual healing website: background watermark removal, dropdown arrow icon removal, and navigation scroll-to-section functionality
passed_tests: Background watermark overlay completely removed from App.js
Work With Me dropdown has no arrow/chevron icons - shows plain text only
Tools dropdown has no arrow/chevron icons - shows plain text only
Work With Me dropdown opens on hover showing all 6 service options
Tools dropdown opens on hover showing Meditations and Programs options
1:1 Virtual navigation: navigates to /work-with-me and scrolls to virtual section
1:1 Mentorship navigation: navigates to /work-with-me and scrolls to mentorship section
Couple Healing navigation: navigates to /work-with-me and scrolls to couple section
Meditations navigation: successfully navigates to /meditations page
Programs navigation: successfully navigates to /programs page
Contact navigation: scrolls to contact section on homepage
